quarantine.blocker: do_not_merge entity_brooklyn-community-board-12 <> entity_community-board-12-brooklyn: record entity_community-board-12-brooklyn is not in the current canonical corpus

original_do_not_merge.reason: Contradiction test (test 1): entity_name differs: the first record is specifically 'Brooklyn Community Board 12 Transportation Committee' (a committee), while the second is 'Community Board 12, Brooklyn' (the full board). A committee is a subsidiary/sub-unit of the board, so by the 'Authority vs subsidiary never merge' rule, they are distinct entities. Relate with part_of_agency, not merge.
